audit_items.proof_trace: The free at L6139-6140 is a sibling `if (temp_portnumber_filename)` check that is independent of the `if (portnumber_file)` block at L6135-6138; it executes unconditionally when temp is non-NULL regardless of whether portnumber_file is NULL. On the normal continuation path (fopen fails, server_sockets succeed), temp_portnumber_filename is correctly freed at L6140. The only paths that skip the free are exit() calls at L6113/L6132, which terminate the process and allow the OS to reclaim memory.
